modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Do I need to fill out FAFSA for distance learning?

full_description_text: I'm only taking online classes. Do I still have to do the FAFSA form? I'm kinda confused about it. Just want to make sure I'm doing the right thing.
short_description: Do I need to fill out FAFSA for distance learning?
description: I'm only taking online classes. Do I still have to do the FAFSA form? I'm kinda confused about it. Just want to make sure I'm doing the right thing.
